name: Shriram Pistons & Rings Limited
summary: Shriram Pistons & Rings Limited manufactures and sells automotive components in India. It offers pistons, piston pins, piston rings, and engine valves. The company also exports its products. It serves OEMs operating in the passenger vehicle, two/three wheeler, commercial vehicle, tractor, and industrial engine markets. The company was incorporated in 1963 and is headquartered in New Delhi, India.
